---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability or improvement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem / use case**
What are you trying to do that Loom doesn't support today?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see. If it's a new subsystem, plant, scenario, or checker rule, see
[docs/extending.md](../../docs/extending.md) — it may already be a no-package-change addition
you could PR.

**Which part of the system?**
<!-- e.g. contract schema, static checker, gate, monitors, plant, dashboard, CLI -->

**Alternatives considered**

**Scope / safety notes**
Does this touch the safety line, the gate, the lock, or the predicate sandbox? (Those need
extra review — see [CONTRIBUTING](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) §5.)
